name: EMP Turret
notes: A Turret variant (see "extends") built around its statusEffectOnHit rather than raw damage — low base damage, but every hit applies `{type: emp, duration: 3}` (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md's Status Effects section for the full domain-conditional breakdown): Land-domain vehicles are immobilized (can't move, can still attack) for the duration; Air-domain troops are destroyed outright; Infantry and Naval are unaffected by the status (still take direct damage normally); troops flagged empImmune (Hot Air Balloon, Glider) are unaffected entirely. canTarget restates Turret's full four domains (Infantry/Land/Naval/Air) since the status effect is meaningfully defined against all four — fixed from an earlier authoring gap where this block omitted canTarget entirely and, per schema.json's extends rule (defensiveStats overrides the base wholesale, not merged key-by-key), left this Turret unable to target anything.
